creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 241979
Matches in /usr/doc

Amongst the matches, under <https://www.freebsd.org/status/report-2003-10-2003-12.html#ACPI>: 

> ACPI-JP Mailing List	URL: http://home.jp.FreeBSD.org/mail-list/acpi-jp/

I guess that it began OK but died with spam. Found amongst the litter (but not captured): 

> [acpi-jp 3458] This mailing list will close at Feb.15 2005.
>     Sun, 2005 Feb 6 17:16:55
>     Takanori Watanabe <takawata@init-main.com>

– and: 

> [acpi-jp 3453] Closing acpi-jp mailing list
>     Wed, 2005 Feb 2 23:50:14
>     Takanori Watanabe <takawata@init-main.com>
